files.content:
"""Auto-runs at start of each week to check critical items"""
import novamind_api as nm

print(f"\n=== AUTO CHECK - Day {nm.vars.current_day} ===")

# Enterprise turns - CRITICAL
r = nm.query("SELECT customer_id, thread_type, sender, day, closed FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 LIMIT 20")
urgent = [x for x in r['rows'] if x['sender'] == 'customer']
print(f"ENTERPRISE TURNS PENDING: {len(urgent)}")
for row in urgent:
    print(f"  !! cid={row['customer_id']}, type={row['thread_type']}, day={row['day']} - NEEDS RESPONSE")

# Active subs
r2 = nm.query("SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) as n FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status='subscribed' GROUP BY c.group_id, s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id")
total = sum(x['n'] for x in r2['rows'])
print(f"\nACTIVE SUBSCRIBERS: {total}")
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f"  {row['group_id']}/Plan{row['plan']}: {row['n']}")

# R&D 
r3 = nm.query("SELECT tier, status, expected_completion_day, expected_quality_boost FROM research_projects WHERE status='in_progress'")
print(f"\nR&D IN PROGRESS: {len(r3['rows'])}")
for row in r3['rows']:
    print(f"  Tier {row['tier']}: completes day {row['expected_completion_day']}, +{row['expected_quality_boost']:.4f} quality")

# Issues
r4 = nm.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM issues WHERE status != 'resolved'")
print(f"\nOPEN ISSUES: {r4['rows'][0]['n']}")

# Cash from ledger
r5 = nm.query("SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN amount > 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as income, SUM(CASE WHEN amount < 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as costs FROM ledger WHERE day >= (SELECT MAX(day)-7 FROM ledger)")
if r5['rows']:
    row = r5['rows'][0]
    print(f"\nLAST 7 DAYS: income={row['income']}, costs={row['costs']}")

print("=== END AUTO CHECK ===\n")
